message:
refactor(abi): migrate 4 more libc::syscall calls in glibc_internal_abi.rs

Part of bd-h5x EPIC: remove glibc callthrough.

Migrated: rresvport_af (socket, close), scandirat (close).

Progress: 44 → 40 libc::syscall calls in this file.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
